## [00:00 - 00:17]

You've presented numbers and heard, I don't think I can afford to do this. Look, I understand your concern. It's natural that you would have that worry. Tell me, what present spending activity is getting in the way of you doing what you want to do? Let's work that out and you can have what you want.
